ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "enrollment_number" TEXT /* Enrollment number of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the student */,
  "resume_submitted" INTEGER /* Whether the student has submitted a resume */,
  "cover_letter_submitted" INTEGER /* Whether the student has submitted a cover letter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact at the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "recruitment_cycle" TEXT /* Recruitment cycle of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "placements" (
  "placement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each placement record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who received the placement */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company offering the placement */,
  "accepted" INTEGER /* Whether the student accepted the placement offer */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date the placement offer was made */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary offered by the company */,
  "position" TEXT /* Job position offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the placement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the placement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the placement */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the company or student about the placement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("placement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placements_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placements_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document submitted (e.g., resume, cover letter) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the document was submitted */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* Path to the stored document */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being interviewed */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company conducting the interview */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview */,
  "interview_time" TEXT /* Time of the interview */,
  "interview_type" TEXT /* Type of interview */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the interview */,
  "interviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the interviewer */,
  "interviewer_email" TEXT /* Email of the interviewer */,
  "interviewer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the interviewer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the interview */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "placements_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "total_offers" INTEGER /* Total number of placement offers made by the company */,
  "accepted_offers" INTEGER /* Number of accepted placement offers */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary offered by the company */,
  "total_applications" INTEGER /* Total number of applications received by the company */,
  "accepted_applications" INTEGER /* Number of accepted applications */,
  "average_gpa" REAL /* Average GPA of students who accepted offers */,
  "highest_salary" REAL /* Highest salary offered by the company */,
  "lowest_salary" REAL /* Lowest salary offered by the company */,
  "interview_to_offer_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of interviews to offers made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placements_stats_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
